query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `manga_uploads` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `fileName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `fileKey` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `fileUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `fileSizeBytes` int,
  `mimeType` varchar(100),
  `pageCount` int,
  `status` enum('uploaded','queued','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'uploaded',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `manga_uploads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `manga_uploads_projectId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `manga_uploads_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

  CONSTRAINT `manga_uploads_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)
